title: Microsoft announces massive job cuts at Xbox and sells studios such as Arkane, Ninja Theory and Double Fine
summary: The largest restructuring in Xbox history aims to focus on core franchises after admitting that Game Pass did not meet expectations.

title: Xbox layoffs leave The Elder Scrolls Online studio decimated and its roadmap up in the air
summary: According to multiple reports, the ZeniMax Online team has lost half of its staff, severely affecting the development of the MMO.

title: Nintendo will stop selling the original Switch in Europe from February 2027
summary: The Japanese company confirms the end of sales of the original hybrid console in Europe to focus on Switch 2.

title: Xbox admits that Game Pass has not worked as expected: 30 million subscribers prove insufficient
summary: Reports indicate that the subscription service has stagnated well below Microsoft's targets, forcing a strategy change.

title: Double Fine, Compulsion, Undead Labs and Ninja Theory regain independence or are sold by Xbox
summary: As part of the restructuring, Xbox is parting ways with several renowned studios, allowing their transition to independent management.

title: The future of Arkane Lyon and Marvel's Blade hangs by a thread as its founder jokes about buying back the studio
summary: The studio behind Dishonored and the Blade game is for sale, temporarily protected by French law while they negotiate their future.

title: Bethesda and ZeniMax will prioritize their star franchises like Fallout, The Elder Scrolls and Quake
summary: The restructuring forces ZeniMax into a planning model focused on its most important series, leaving other projects up in the air.

title: Sony's decision to eliminate physical discs on PlayStation generates a wave of criticism with over 170,000 signatures
summary: Players, collectors and French politicians unite against the end of the physical format, while Sony breaks its silence and is harshly criticized.

title: Obsidian Entertainment loses a quarter of its staff in massive Xbox layoffs
summary: The studio behind Fallout: New Vegas, The Outer Worlds and Grounded is severely affected, losing veterans and newcomers alike.

title: Layoffs at id Software eliminate half the staff and John Romero calls for preserving the studio's history
summary: The Doom studio is one of the hardest hit by Xbox's cuts, coinciding with the release of the Doom: The Dark Ages DLC.

title: LEGO reveals five new Pokémon sets including leaked designs and high prices
summary: The collaboration between LEGO and Pokémon introduces new building figures that have caused a stir among collectors due to their prices.

title: Jaleco Arcade Collection Vol. 1 and Vol. 2 will arrive this winter on PS5, Switch and PC
summary: Gravity Game Arise confirms the release of two compilations of classic Jaleco arcade games for modern consoles and PC.

title: IO Interactive closes its studio in Istanbul after Project Fantasy, its agreement with Xbox, is canceled
summary: The Hitman studio confirms layoffs and the closure of its headquarters in Turkey, although it assures that Project Fantasy is not completely dead.

title: First reactions to Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' compare it to Peter Jackson's 'The Lord of the Rings'
summary: The epic adaptation of the Homeric poem receives divided but strong reviews, highlighting Lupita Nyong'o's performance.

title: Nintendo confirms replaceable batteries for Switch 2, though not in all markets
summary: Switch 2 revisions in Europe will feature user-replaceable batteries, while the US will not receive this version.

title: World of Warcraft has a sequel to its most famous viral outbreak in the Moon Guard Plague
summary: Blizzard releases a patch that fixes a new plague in WoW that went viral, reminiscent of the infamous Corrupted Blood incident.

title: Niantic changes its name and logo as Pokémon GO celebrates its tenth anniversary
summary: The developer of Pokémon GO renews its corporate identity amid celebrations for a decade of the successful augmented reality game.

title: 'Orbitals', the cooperative space anime game, announces its voice cast and shows its initial animation
summary: A new trailer and preview of the game generate great expectation for its retro animation style and fun cooperative gameplay.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces the new July games including Tony Hawk, Palworld and The Planet Crafter
summary: The second wave of July games for the subscription service includes major releases and the version 1.0 of Palworld.

title: A $1 million fund supports fighting tournaments while a former Tekken boss criticizes the industry
summary: Fighting game communities receive significant financial support, and the legendary Katsuhiro Harada offers his perspective on the industry.
